ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the patient's medical record */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient's emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the patient's insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Identification number provided by the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the clinic */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the clinic */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the clinic's website */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinic where the doctor works */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience the doctor has */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctors_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who visited */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who treated the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial, follow-up, emergency) */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "visit_status" TEXT /* Status of the visit (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit where the symptom was reported */,
  "symptom_description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the symptom (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "onset_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom first appeared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptoms_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bprst_classification" (
  "bprst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BPRST classification */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit where the classification was recorded */,
  "bleeding" TEXT /* Bleeding classification */,
  "pain" TEXT /* Pain classification */,
  "redness" TEXT /* Redness classification */,
  "swelling" TEXT /* Swelling classification */,
  "tenderness" TEXT /* Tenderness classification */,
  "stage" TEXT /* Stage of the condition */,
  "figure" TEXT /* Figure reference */,
  "severity_score" INTEGER /* A numerical score to quantify the severity of BPRST */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations related to the BPRST classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bprst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bprst_classification_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit where the prescription was given */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the medication */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed for the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was issued */,
  "pharmacy_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for the pharmacy (e.g., special handling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit being followed up */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments from the follow-up */,
  "follow_up_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up (e.g., scheduled, completed, missed) */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., cardiology, pediatrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
